'''''Kann''''' was a [[cargo ferry]] used by [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]]. The cargo ferry was part of an illicit weapons deal between the [[Mugaari pirates]] and the Rebels. However, the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperials]] attacked the the [[Mugaari cargo loading area|cargo loading area]] and the cargo ferry, along with all the other Mugaari and rebel ships were destroyed in the [[Battle of the Tungra sector]].

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: TIE Fighter (video game)|''Star Wars: TIE Fighter'']]
